purpose: Ensure the video workflow is backed by reusable production knowledge, a locked design language, reference assets, and examples rather than a bare SOP.

cases.prompt: 用这个 AI 产品更新做一条 30 秒 9:16 短视频，风格要极简、以后能持续复用。
cases.expect: selects the ai-demo project template, minimal preset, opening/storytelling/outro/caption templates, relevant shots and an explicit quality gate

cases.prompt: 我有一段产品录屏和 3 个卖点，做成 TikTok 讲解视频。
cases.expect: selects the product project template and a concrete preset, uses product and B-roll prompt forms, keeps subtitle and motion behavior consistent with the chosen style

cases.prompt: 把今天 AI 融资新闻做成 45 秒新闻卡片视频。
cases.expect: selects the news project template, Bloomberg preset or an explicit alternative, verifies facts and cites the news script, shot, layout and reference requirements

cases.prompt: 不要锁风格，随便混用现有设计 Skill，直接出片。
cases.expect: keeps a single selected preset and explains that generic outside-style instructions cannot override the production design language without an explicit style change
